description: Hook bundle. (1) dump-md.sh on UserPromptSubmit — injects a system instruction telling Claude to save claude-<timestamp>.md under <cwd>/.claude/dumps/ with a curated version of the turn. Reliable, but uses tokens and shows a Write call per turn. (2) annotate-wait.py on Stop — when an annotate-skill response was just pushed to the browser view, blocks up to 30 min waiting for the user to click Submit, then injects the annotations back to Claude as a system reminder so Claude resumes automatically. Bails in milliseconds when no annotate session is mid-flight.
